narrative.headline: What 2019 Honda Cr-V owners report most
narrative.summary: The most commonly reported concern on the CR-V centers on the forward collision avoidance system activating unexpectedly while driving at speed, sometimes causing crashes. Owners also report the steering system behaving in unwanted ways, tied to lane-keeping behavior that cannot be disabled through normal controls. Electrical system failures and fuel filler issues round out the pattern of complaints.

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: Owners report the automatic braking system engaging without warning while driving, triggered by nearby vehicles that are pausing or moving alongside, sometimes resulting in crashes. · 7 crash · 17 injured

issues.sample: WITH THE 2019 MODEL OF CR-V, I AM UNABLE TO ONLY TURN OF THE LANE KEEP ASSIST. THERE IS NO MENTION IN THE OWNER'S MANUAL ABOUT HOW TO EXCLUSIVELY TURN THE LANE KEEP ASSIST OFF, OR AT THE VERY LEAST CONFIGURE IT SO THAT IT DOES NOT APPLY FORCE ON THE STEERING WHEEL. ALL OTHER ADVA
issues.title: Steering
issues.blurb: Owners report being unable to turn off the lane keep assist independently, with the owner's manual offering no clear instructions for disabling or configuring it separately from other systems. · 2 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle shaking, vibrating, and decelerating while driving at highway speed, accompanied by simultaneous warnings or failures across multiple systems including the electric parking brake, transmission, brakes, and adaptive cruise control. · 1 crash · 1 injured

issues.sample: WHILE REFUELING (AT DIFFERENT GAS STATIONS AND DIFFERENT PUMPS) THE FUEL NOZZLE BECOMES STUCK IN THE CAP LESS FILLER. LOCATED IN CALIFORNIA, WHERE THE PUMPS HAVE THE VAPOR RE-CYCLER. DON'T KNOW IF THAT IS CAUSING THE ISSUE OR NOT. THIS IS WHILE VEHICLE IS STOPPED, ENGINE OFF. WAI
issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report the fuel nozzle becoming stuck in the capless filler opening during refueling, occurring across different gas stations and different pumps. · 2 crash
